notes: ML classifier trained on 2786 BSLDict multi-signer videos (944 signs, avg 3.0 per sign), tested on original 119 test videos. Scaled MLP architecture (512→256→128) with 120 epochs, batch 128 for large vocabulary. 20 augmentations per sample. Features extracted using Python MediaPipe. CV accuracy 99.8% Top-1, 100% Top-5.
changes: Vocabulary expanded from 119 to 944 signs (8x increase)
2786 BSLDict training videos (up from 515 in v15)
Includes fingerspelling (A-Z), numbers (1-20), pronouns, verbs, time/calendar, people/family, etc.
Scaled architecture: [512, 256, 128] hidden dims, 120 epochs, batch 128
Model size: 1419KB ONNX (up from ~343KB in v15)
Only 1 test regression despite 8x vocabulary increase

failDetails.CORRECT: predicted RIGHT (100%) — semantically correct, label mismatch
failDetails.HOSPITAL: predicted EXCITED (26%) — only 1 BSLDict training video
failDetails.NIGHT: predicted DARK (97%) — semantically correct, label mismatch
failDetails.STAND: predicted PERSON (37%) — only 1 BSLDict training video
failDetails.WHAT: predicted VILLAGE (45%) — new failure in v16

comparedToV15.note: Only 1 regression (WHAT) despite expanding vocabulary from 119 to 944 signs. The expanded vocabulary includes fingerspelling, numbers, and hundreds of conversational signs. Some failures are semantically correct but mismatched labels (CORRECT→RIGHT, NIGHT→DARK, START→GET).

categories: Pronouns (I, YOU, HE, SHE, WE, THEY, etc.)
Verbs (AGREE, ARRIVE, ASK, BELIEVE, BUILD, etc.)
Animals (BIRD, CAT, DOG, ELEPHANT, FISH, etc.)
Body/Health (ARM, BRAIN, EAR, EYE, HEART, etc.)
